channel.title: Tattoo Pain on Lan Pink Tattoo
channel.description: Recent content in Tattoo Pain on Lan Pink Tattoo

item.title: Lining Needles vs Shading Needles: Which One Hurts More?
item.description:
Lining Needles vs Shading Needles: Which One Hurts More?

One of the biggest surprises for first-time tattoo clients is discovering that tattoo pain does not feel the same throughout the entire session.

Many people notice a clear difference between the sensation of lining and shading. While both involve tattoo needles, the discomfort they create can feel completely different.

So, which one hurts more: lining needles or shading needles?

The truth is that neither is universally more painful. They simply create different types of sensations on the skin.

item.title: Tattoo FAQ | Frequently Asked Questions
item.description:
Tattoo FAQ | Frequently Asked Questions

Have questions before getting a tattoo? This FAQ covers the most common things clients ask Lan Pink Tattoo, from pain level and pricing to aftercare, healing time, touch-ups, and booking.

If this is your first tattoo, you may also want to read our first tattoo preparation guide before your appointment.

Does getting a tattoo hurt?

Yes, getting a tattoo involves some discomfort, but the pain level depends on the placement, tattoo size, session length, and your personal pain tolerance.
